overrides.expect: S _ {n, (u)} = \left\{ \begin{array}{c l} S _ {n, m} & \text {if u = m\in\{0,1,\ldots,n\}} \\ \text {linear for u\in[m - 1,m]} & \text {when m\in\{1,\ldots,n\}} \end{array} \right.
overrides.new: S _ { n , (u) } = \left\{\begin{array}{c l}S_{n, m} & \text{if }u = m\in\{0,1,\ldots,n\}\\ \text{linear for }u\in[m - 1,m] & \text{when }m\in\{1,\ldots,n\}\end{array}\right.
